name: Fowl Gumbo
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the fowl until tender. Debone and cut into small pieces. Reserve the broth.
2. Add bell pepper, onions, celery, tomatoes, tomato paste, garlic salt, red pepper, and okra to the reserved broth. Stir well.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil and simmer until the vegetables are tender.
4. Add the cooked chicken to the pot. Stir in enough flour (about 2-3 tablespoons) with some water or chicken broth to thicken the sauce into a thick brown gravy.
5. Season with salt to taste.
6. Just prior to serving, gradually add ground filé until the mixture is slightly thick and slightly ropy. Adjust seasoning if needed.
7. Serve hot over rice or cornbread.
